properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 68/20
BARENTS SEA
SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS BY SEISMIC VESSEL RAMFORM TETHYS FROM 04 JUL 2020 UNTIL 31 SEP 2020. TOWING 16 X 10000 METERS LONG CABLES IN THE AREA BOUNDED;
A. 71-33.59N  021-31.80E.
B. 70-39.04N  020-16.19E.
C. 70-29.12N  018-57.04E.
D. 72-23.32N  021-34.31E.
E. 72-23.04N  023-44.19E.
F. 71-33.29N  022-25.37E.
SUPPORT VESSELS IN ATTENDANCE ARE M/V THOR FREYJA AND M/V THOR ALPHA.
WIDE BERTH IS REQUESTED  7 NM ASTERN, 3 NM PORT AND STARBOARD AND AHEAD, VESSELS CAN BE CONTACTED ON VHF 16 AND VHF 72.
